message:
fix(demo): update stale snapshots for perf HUD and mermaid showcase

Regenerate snapshot baselines after:
- Performance HUD mouse/keyboard changes (status bar updated)
- Mermaid showcase error sample rendering changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
